executive_summary: US-Iran conflict is the single dominant crisis — shoot-and-kill orders for Iranian mine-boats at Hormuz, three carrier groups deployed, war entering day 55. WHCD assassination attempt on Trump adds domestic US instability to the global picture. Iran foreign minister in Moscow after Pakistan stop while Trump cancelled Witkoff/Kushner delegation. On markets: Brent above $107 on ceasefire cracks, Warsh cleared for Fed Chair, NVDA called generational buy with SK Hynix posting 5x profit surge. Climate: Iran Day Zero water crisis flagged CRITICAL, Georgia wildfires burning 32,000 acres, M7.4 Japan earthquake, US Southwest heat wave shattering April records.

key_themes.description: The US Navy has been authorized to 'shoot and kill' Iranian mine-laying boats at the Strait of Hormuz. Three carrier groups (Abraham Lincoln, Gerald R. Ford, George H.W. Bush) are deployed simultaneously. The blockade has turned away 34 ships. Iran FM Araghchi is in Moscow after Pakistan visit, while Trump cancelled Witkoff/Kushner delegation to Pakistan. Hegseth: 'all the time in the world, not anxious for a deal.'
supporting_evidence: Defense One: US Navy ordered shoot-and-kill for suspected Iranian mine-laying boats
BBc: 3 US carrier groups operating in Middle East simultaneously
Al Jazeera: Araghchi in Moscow after Pakistan stop

key_themes.theme: WHCD Shooting — Assassination Attempt on Trump
key_themes.description: Cole Allen, 31-year-old California man, opened fire at the White House Correspondents' Dinner security screening. Trump and senior officials were evacuated. Allen sent anti-Christian declaration to family and intended to target government officials. First assassination attempt at a major US political/media event in decades.
supporting_evidence: BBC: Trump and officials likely targets at media dinner
NPR: suspect arrested, no injuries reported

key_themes.theme: Lebanon Ceasefire Collapsing — Netanyahu Orders Hezbollah Attacks
key_themes.description: Netanyahu ordered Israeli military to 'vigorously attack' Hezbollah as six people were killed by Israeli strikes despite a ceasefire extension. Forced evacuation orders issued for southern Lebanon. Hezbollah rejected Netanyahu's allegations. The multi-front Middle East is re-escalating simultaneously with the US-Iran war.
supporting_evidence: BBC: Netanyahu orders vigorous Hezbollah attacks
Al Jazeera: forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon

key_themes.description: Brent crude breached $107/barrel after Iran peace talks stalled. Goldman Sachs raised oil price forecasts citing supply tightness. Markets whipsawed mid-week: records on ceasefire hope, then selloff as talks faltered. US producers not ramping output despite price incentives, leaving market exposed.
supporting_evidence: CNBC: Brent crude >$107 on Iran peace talk stall
Goldman Sachs raised oil price forecasts
JPMorgan: prices have further to run
Fortune: US producers not ramping despite price incentives

key_themes.theme: NVDA 'Generational Buy' + SK Hynix 5x Profit Surge
key_themes.description: NVIDIA called a generational buying opportunity by Fool.com analysts. BofA projects global chip sales hitting $1 trillion in 2026. SK Hynix reported record operating profit up 5x YoY on HBM demand. Key blind spot: Middle East helium shortage threatening semiconductor fab supply chain.
supporting_evidence: SK Hynix: 5x profit surge, record HBM demand
SimplyWall.St: helium shock tests NVDA AI supply chain

critical: US Navy authorized 'shoot and kill' on Iranian mine-boats at Hormuz — 3 carrier groups, war day 55
Iran Day Zero water crisis — taps running dry for millions
high: WHCD shooting — Cole Allen arrested, Trump and officials were likely targets
Iran FM Araghchi in Moscow after Pakistan; Trump cancelled Witkoff/Kushner delegation
Netanyahu orders vigorous Hezbollah attacks; forced evacuation orders for southern Lebanon
Brent crude >$107/barrel as Iran peace talks falter
Tillis clears Warsh for Fed Chair; Powell's future uncertain post-probe
Pineland Road Fire Georgia — 32,000 acres, hundreds of structures threatened
M7.4 earthquake near Miyako, Japan — significant Ring of Fire event
Record-breaking US Southwest heat wave — April records shattered
Brantley County wildfire burns 20,000 acres, Georgia
medium: Mali defence minister killed — coordinated jihadist + separatist attacks
US State Dept global alert on DeepSeek/Chinese AI firms for data theft
Highway bomb kills 19 in Colombia's Cauca ahead of elections
US stocks hit record then slip on ceasefire jitters
Bitcoin whales aggressively long near $80K (negative funding contrarian signal)
5 central banks meet this week + US PCE/GDP/PMI data
Aave recovers 80% of $200M Kelp DAO exploit
low: Space Force awards $3.2B to SpaceX, Anduril, Raytheon for Golden Dome interceptors
Quantum computing threat to 5.6M dormant Bitcoin debated

patterns: US-Iran conflict dominates all three domains simultaneously — military, energy markets, climate (Iran Day Zero water crisis)
Middle East multi-front is collapsing: US-Iran Hormuz blockade + Lebanon ceasefire breaking + Israel-Hezbollah escalation all happening at once
Fed leadership transition adds uncertainty to rate path during already complex macro period
AI semiconductor bull thesis intact but supply chain risks (helium, geopolitics) becoming visible
Ceasefire-dependent markets whipsaw — any diplomatic breakdown spikes oil and sells equities
blind_spots: Iran navy/missile capabilities — limited visibility on whether Tehran will escalate with actual mines
EU/European response to Hormuz blockade — energy dependency could create transatlantic friction
Helium shortage for semiconductor fabs — largely underreported, affects TSMC/Samsung/SK Hynix/Micron
China's domestic AI chip share gains inside China due to US export controls
Fed discount rate minutes from Feb-March contain hawkish nuances not yet priced by markets

Al Jazeera — Iran FM Araghchi Moscow after Pakistan
CNBC — Brent crude $107 Iran peace talks falter
